manifest.name: HTML Preview

name: HTML Preview

releases.author: HxWGuang
releases.description:
Rename plugin from "Live Preview" to "HTML Preview" to comply with Obsidian community plugin directory naming policy.

The name "Live Preview" conflicts with Obsidian's built-in editor mode, causing the plugin to be hidden from the community directory.

**Changes:**
- Plugin name changed from "Live Preview" to "HTML Preview"
- Command names simplified: "Start preview" / "Stop preview"
- Version bumped to 1.0.2
- minAppVersion updated to 0.16.0

releases.author: HxWGuang
releases.description: Replace element.style.* with CSS classes. Use activeDocument. Remove plugin ID/name from command IDs. Handle unawaited promises. Fix unknown type. Align onunload return type. Add type assertion. Bump minAppVersion to 0.16.0.

releases.author: HxWGuang
releases.description:
## 1.0.0 — Initial Release

Live HTML preview for Obsidian, inspired by VSCode Live Preview.

### Features
- Local HTTP server serving HTML files with proper relative-path support
- WebSocket-based auto-reload (debounced, configurable delay)
- Embedded preview panel (right sidebar / split pane)
- One-click open in system browser
- Path traversal protection & localhost-only binding
- Port auto-increment on conflict

### Installation
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from the assets below
2. Place them into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/live-preview/`
3. Reload Obsidian and enable the plugin

### Requirements
- Obsidian 0.15.0+
- Desktop only
